summary: Made surgical seam edits to strengthen the laundromat-to-date carryover from chapter 6 and to sharpen Nita's service-control pressure heading into chapter 8.
edits: Anchored the opening to the immediately prior laundromat/home sequence and reinforced that the laundry setup is still physically present.
Added Nita's phone to the late-night kitchen tableau to support the next chapter's phone-surrender handoff.
Adjusted the closing reflection so Nita's resistance to systems taking over 'small decisions' points more directly into chapter 8.
